content.text:
<user_query>
Explore this repo for identity enrichment and report-generation transformation layers relevant to calibration. Find where ABN lookup/validation, Perplexity outputs, HTML extraction, and social handle extraction currently happen. Return:
1) exact file paths and key functions,
2) data structures for wowSummary._full, extracted_data.abn, identity_signals.abn_candidates,
3) existing ABN GUD API integration points,
4) current social merge logic and source precedence,
5) where frontend consumes identity signals and displays multiple-match options,
6) existing tests and fixtures.
Do not edit files.
</user_query>
Searching the repository for identity enrichment, calibration, ABN, Perplexity, HTML extraction, social handles, and related structures.

Here is a concise report based on read-only exploration of `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg`. --- ## 1) Exact file paths and key functions ### Calibration / identity enrichment pipeline | Area | Path | Key functions / entry points | |------|------|------------------------------| | Edge: domain scan + Perplexity + HTML + merge | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\calibration-business-dna\index.ts` | `deepSearch`, `fetchWebsiteHtml`, `stripHtmlTags`, `scrapeWebsite` / `scrapeWebsiteWithKeyPages`, `extractIdentitySignals`, merge into `extracted`, HTTP `serve` handler | | Edge: ABR lookup (JSONP) | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\business-identity-lookup\index.ts` | `lookupByAbn`, `searchByName`, `scoreMatch`, `serve` | | Backend: deep scan / report-style enrichment | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\backend\routes\calibration.py` | `_extract_abn_candidates`, `_extract_social_handles_from_html`, `_extract_title`, `_extract_meta_content`, `website_enrichment` (`POST /enrichment/website`) | | Frontend: orchestration + `wowSummary._full` | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\frontend\src\hooks\useCalibrationState.js` | `handleAuditSubmit`, `handleConfirmWow`, `handleAbnLookup`, merge of edge + `POST /calibration/enrichment/website` | | Frontend: identity parsing | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\frontend\src\components\calibration\ForensicIdentityCard.js` | `parseIdentitySignals`, `ForensicIdentityCard` (ABR lookup UI) | | Frontend: CMO / footprint report from `_full` | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\frontend\src\components\calibration\ChiefMarketingSummary.js` | `ChiefMarketingSummary` (reads `wowSummary._full`) | | Edge: fast HTML metadata (no LLM) | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\scrape-business-profile\index.ts` | `fetchWithRedirects`, `extractMetadata`, `serve` | ### Perplexity (other modules, not calibration DNA) - `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\strategic-console-ai\index.ts` - `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\market-analysis-ai\index.ts` - `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\competitor-monitor\index.ts` - `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\biqc-insights-cognitive\index.ts` --- ## 2) Data structures: `wowSummary._full`, `extracted_data.abn`, `identity_signals.abn_candidates` ### `wowSummary._full` (frontend) Built in `handleAuditSubmit` as `fullExtraction`: merged **edge** `extracted_data` plus optional **backend** deep enrichment, then metadata: ```413:419:C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\frontend\src\hooks\useCalibrationState.js const fullExtraction = { ...ex, _sources: auditData.data_sources || [], _deep_sources: deepEnrichment?.sources || null, _website: url, _generated_at: auditData.generated_at || new Date().toISOString(), }; ``` `ex` is the edge `extracted_data` shape, overlaid with `deepEnrichment` fields (business fields, `abn`, `social_media_links` from `social_handles`, CMO bundle fields, etc.). It is attached as `wow._full` (see lines 421–430 in the same file). ### `extracted_data.abn` From the edge function: OpenAI JSON (`extracted.abn`), then **overridden** when deterministic ABN exists and AI is empty or placeholder `"Not available from current data"`: ```520:522:C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\calibration-business-dna\index.ts if (identitySignals.abn_candidates?.length > 0 && (!extracted.abn || extracted.abn === "Not available from current data")) { extracted.abn = identitySignals.abn_candidates[0]; ``` Full `extracted` schema is defined in `EXTRACTION_PROMPT` (e.g. `abn`, `social_media_links`, etc.) in the same file. ### `identity_signals` / `abn_candidates` Server-side `identitySignals` is produced by `extractIdentitySignals(allContent, websiteUrl)` and returned as top-level `identity_signals`; ABN list is: ```184:187:C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\calibration-business-dna\index.ts const abnPattern = /\b(\d{2}\s?\d{3}\s?\d{3}\s?\d{3})\b/g; const abnMatches = [...new Set((allContent.match(abnPattern) || []))]; signals.abn_candidates = abnMatches.filter(m => m.replace(/\s/g, '').length === 11).slice(0, 3); ``` The same object is also stored on the extraction payload as `extracted._identity_signals` before the HTTP response returns `identity_signals: identitySignals`. --- ## 3) ABN GUD / ABR API integration points The Australian Business Register integration lives only in the **business-identity-lookup** Edge Function: - **GUID env**: `ABR_GUID` **or** `ABR_GUD` **or** `ABR_API_GUID` (alias for the same secret). ```26:30:C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\business-identity-lookup\index.ts const ABR_GUID = Deno.env.get("ABR_GUID") || Deno.env.get("ABR_GUD") || Deno.env.get("ABR_API_GUID") || ""; ``` - **Direct ABN**: `https://abr.business.gov.au/json/AbnDetails.aspx?abn=...&callback=callback&guid=${ABR_GUID}` (`lookupByAbn`). - **Name search**: `https://abr.business.gov.au/json/MatchingNames.aspx?name=...` (`searchByName`). The frontend does **not** call ABR directly; it calls this function via `callEdgeFunction('business-identity-lookup', ...)` in `useCalibrationState.js` (`handleAbnLookup`). --- ## 4) Social merge logic and source precedence **Edge (`calibration-business-dna`):** Regex-based `identitySignals.social_media_links` (first match per platform) is merged into AI `extracted.social_media_links` **only for platforms that are still empty** on the AI object: ```536:540:C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\supabase\functions\calibration-business-dna\index.ts if (identitySignals.social_media_links) { if (!extracted.social_media_links || typeof extracted.social_media_links !== 'object') extracted.social_media_links = {}; for (const [platform, url] of Object.entries(identitySignals.social_media_links)) { if (url && !extracted.social_media_links[platform]) extracted.social_media_links[platform] = url; ``` So **AI-filled platform slots are kept**; deterministic signals **fill gaps**. **Backend (`/enrichment/website`):** Order is roughly: (1) `_extract_social_handles_from_html(raw_html)` per platform, (2) AI JSON merged with `enrichment.update(...)`, (3) **second pass** over `combined_text` (page + Serper snippets) for any platform still empty: ```986:997:C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\backend\routes\calibration.py # deterministic social handle fallback extraction for platform, pattern in { "linkedin": r"https?://(?:www\.)?linkedin\.com/[\w\-/]+", ... }.items(): if not enrichment["social_handles"].get(platform): m = re.search(pattern, combined_text, re.IGNORECASE) if m: enrichment["social_handles"][platform] = m.group(0) ``` **Frontend merge into `ex`:** Deep enrichment **wins** for `social_media_links` when present: `social_media_links: deepEnrichment.social_handles || exRaw.social_media_links || {}` (`useCalibrationState.js` around line 398). **`parseIdentitySignals` (browser):** Collects URLs from stringified extracted fields via regex, then merges `d.social_media_links` entries **without duplicating** an existing platform (regex matches first; object fills missing platforms). --- ## 5) Where the frontend consumes identity signals and “multiple match” UI - **Scan-time `identity_signals` / `abn_candidates`:** Consumed in `handleAuditSubmit` (and regenerate path): `edgeSignals = auditData.identity_signals || ex._identity_signals`; **only the first** `abn_candidates` entry is applied when `signals.abn` is missing (lines 443–452). There is **no** UI to pick among scan-time `abn_candidates`. - **Identity verification UI:** `ForensicIdentityCard` displays parsed `identitySignals` (name, address, ABN string, emails, phones, social chips). - **Multiple matches:** Shown only for **ABR name search** when the edge returns `status === 'ambiguous'` and `suggestions` (up to 5 from server; UI lists first 3): ```363:368:C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\frontend\src\components\calibration\ForensicIdentityCard.js {lookupResult.status === 'ambiguous' && lookupResult.suggestions?.length > 0 && (

Multiple matches — review below

{lookupResult.suggestions.slice(0, 3).map((s, i) => ( ``` - **Report layer:** `ChiefMarketingSummary` reads `const full = (wowSummary?._full) || wowSummary || {}` and uses fields like `social_media_links`, CMO fields, etc.—not the raw `identity_signals` object. --- ## 6) Existing tests and fixtures | File | What it covers | |------|----------------| | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\backend\tests\test_iteration_130_production.py` | `test_08_calibration_enrichment_deep_scan` — hits `POST /api/enrichment/website`, checks enrichment including `social_handles`, `abn`, etc. | | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\backend\tests\test_ai_modules_iteration129.py` | `test_08_calibration_enrichment_quality` — enrichment payload quality | | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\backend\tests\test_iteration127_trinity_deep_scan.py` | Enrichment route exists / auth / Trinity metadata | | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\backend\tests\test_iteration95_forensic_corrections.py` | Static/source check that `calibration-business-dna` is referenced | | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\backend\tests\test_iteration27_phase2_deconstruction.py` | `POST /api/enrichment/website` requires auth | | `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\khg\test_result.md` | Manual / regression notes mentioning `/api/enrichment/website` (not a pytest fixture) | **Fixtures:** No dedicated JSON fixtures for `identity_signals` or `wowSummary._full` showed up in these searches; calibration coverage is mostly **live HTTP** tests against `BASE_URL` plus the forensic static assertion above. --- **Note:** HTML extraction for calibration happens in **three** places: (1) `calibration-business-dna` — `fetchWebsiteHtml` + Firecrawl markdown; (2) `scrape-business-profile` — metadata from HTML; (3) `calibration.py` `website_enrichment` — `httpx` GET + `_extract_social_handles_from_html` + `scrape_url_text` via `core.helpers`.
